privacy.title: Welcome to EsperanzApp
privacy.subtitle: The app works entirely on your phone, no internet needed.

points.noServer: Your data stays on your device

counter.title: EsperanzApp, your ally!
counter.body: Breaking a habit is built day by day. Every day without a relapse is a small victory! EsperanzApp walks with you.

relapse.title: A Relapse?
relapse.body: If you relapse on a habit you want to break free from, you can log it in the habit's history.

milestones.title: Milestones on the way...
milestones.body: 1 day, 7, 30, 90 or more... Each milestone is a step forward that will help you on your journey.

private.title: 100% private
private.body: Nothing leaves your device. No account, no server, no outside eyes.

stats.title: Track your progress
stats.body: For each habit, you can view your stats and progress over time.

firstHabit.title: Which habit do you want to break free from?
firstHabit.subtitle: You can add more later.

habits.title: My habits
habits.deleteConfirm: Delete this habit and all its history?
habits.empty:
No habits yet.
Start by adding one.
habits.duplicateWarning: You are already tracking this habit. You cannot add a duplicate.

cannabis.label: Cannabis
cannabis.desc: Recreational use or habit to reduce

social_media.label: Social media
social_media.desc: Instagram, TikTok, X and the rest

gaming.label: Gaming
gaming.desc: Compulsive gaming to take back control of

shopping.label: Compulsive shopping
shopping.desc: Impulsive buying online or in stores

messages.awakening: Day one. This is where it starts.
messages.anchoring: 2 weeks. This is no longer chance, it's a choice.
messages.solidity: One month. You've proven something to yourself.
messages.freedom: 6 months. You're not the same person you were on day one.
messages.fulfilledAwakening: One year. Few people get here. You did.

relapse.title: Start again
relapse.confirmBody: These days are yours. They stay.

messages.before7days: {{name}}, those {{days}} days count. You start again today.
messages.between7and30days: {{name}}, you held on for {{days}} days. This isn't a failure. You know what you're capable of.
messages.after30days: {{name}}, you held on for {{days}} days. That is immense. Everything you learned stays with you.
messages.day0: {{name}}, what matters is trying. Start again when you're ready.

treatments.title: My treatments
treatments.deleteConfirm: Delete this treatment and all its history?

export.title: Data
export.importWarning: Import will add data to what already exists.
export.importWarningBody: Import will add data without overwriting existing records. Duplicates may appear. Files saved in Downloads can be accessed by other apps.
export.privacyWarningTitle: This data is personal and sensitive
export.privacyWarningBody: The exported file contains health information. Once saved to Downloads, it may be accessible by other applications or anyone with access to this device.

settings.title: Settings
settings.deleteAllConfirm: This action cannot be undone. All your data will be erased from this device.
